title: Sustainable Management of Natural Resources - Case Studies

questions.text: Which one of the following is NOT correct for biogas?
Which of the following best indicates the steps of anaerobic digestion?
options: Waste water feed -> digester -> biogas -> biogas storage -> generator
Generator -> waste water feed -> digester -> biogas -> biogas storage
Waste water feed -> biogas -> digester -> biogas storage -> generator

questions.text: Biogas is a better fuel than animal dung cake because: (i) Biogas has lower calorific value (ii) Animal dung cake has higher calorific value (iii) Biogas has high heating capacity (iv) Biogas burns without smoke.

options: presence of air and absence of water
presence of water and absence of air

questions.text: Biogas is a mixture of the following gases:
options: Ethane, Carbon monoxide, Nitrogen and Butane
Methane, Hydrogen, Carbon dioxide and Nitrogen
Butane, Carbon monoxide, Propane and Hydrogen
Carbon monoxide, Sulphur dioxide and Hydrogen

questions.text: Raw material used in a bio gas plant is:
